commands.payload:
Usage: JayTech.Tools.Oas.OperationGenerator [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  create        
  delete        

Run 'JayTech.Tools.Oas.OperationGenerator [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: JayTech.Tools.Oas.OperationGenerator create [options]

Options:
  --help                  Show help information.
  -fi|--file              File name (include extension)
  -f|--folder             Path to your oas.yaml directory
  -m|--method             Type of method for the path (ex. GET or POST)
  -o|--operation          Set operationId (also used for naming the files for
                          the new path)
  -p|--path               Route of the path to create (ex.
                          /loan/{loanNumber}/loan-parts)
  -t|--tag                Tag name (to group it with other operations, or create
                          a new group)
  -r|--request-body       Provide -r to generate a request body
  -e|--external-examples  Provide -e to generate external example files in the
                          'examples' directory
